/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/MazeGame.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeGame.dir/Maze.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeGame.dir/Interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MazeGame.dir/Stack.cpp.o -o MazeGame  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
